title: lomaria procera var. minor
intro: Lomaria procera var. minor, also known as the mountain fern, is a variety of the Lomaria procera plant that belongs to the Osmundaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lomaria procera var. minor include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
